issues.description: Vision says 5-minute first install on M4 Mac; PRD M1 acceptance criteria says <10 minutes. PRD is more lenient than Vision's success criteria.
issues.from_item: Vision 成功标准: npx agentic-service 在 M4 Mac 上 5 分钟内完成首次安装 + 启动
issues.to_item: PRD M1 验收标准: 首次安装（含模型下载）< 10 分钟

issues.description: Vision mentions 3 hardware configs (Apple Silicon / NVIDIA / CPU-only) as success criteria. PRD M2 implicitly covers this via STT provider mapping but never explicitly states 3-config support as a requirement.
issues.from_item: Vision 成功标准: 支持至少 3 种硬件配置（Apple Silicon / NVIDIA / CPU-only）
issues.to_item: PRD M2 F1 implicitly maps providers to hardware but does not state explicit 3-config acceptance criterion

issues.description: PRD M4 specifies default port 1234. Architecture install flow says 'http://localhost:3000' and Docker example uses '-p 3000:3000', contradicting the PRD.
issues.from_item: PRD M4 技术规格: 默认端口 — 1234 (bin/agentic-service.js)
issues.to_item: Architecture: 'docker run -p 3000:3000' and '打开浏览器 → http://localhost:3000'

issues.description: PRD M4 specifies cloud fallback triggers: timeout >5s OR 3 consecutive errors, with 60s recovery probe. Architecture llm.js only says '超时/失败 → 云端 fallback' without specifying thresholds.
issues.from_item: PRD M4: 本地 LLM 超时 >5s 或连续 3 次错误 → 自动切换；60s 探测成功后恢复本地
issues.to_item: Architecture runtime/llm.js: '自动选择：本地 Ollama 优先，超时/失败 → 云端 fallback' (no thresholds)

issues.description: PRD M4 specifies watchProfiles() with 30s polling and ETag conditional fetch for config hot-reload. Architecture profiles.js only documents getProfile() — no watchProfiles() or polling mechanism.
issues.from_item: PRD M4: 配置热更新 — watchProfiles() 每 30s 轮询，ETag 条件获取 (detector/profiles.js)

issues.description: PRD M2 specifies profiler.js enforcing 2000ms latency budget. Architecture has no profiler module or latency enforcement mechanism documented.
issues.from_item: PRD M2 技术规格: profiler.js 强制 2000ms 预算
issues.to_item: Architecture: no profiler.js or latency budget enforcement documented

issues.description: PRD M2 specifies wake word feature with configurable keyword (default 'hey') via audio-level detection in runtime/sense.js. Architecture does not document sense.js in the Runtime module interfaces.
issues.from_item: PRD M2: 唤醒词 — 可配置唤醒词（默认 'hey'），audio-level 检测 (runtime/sense.js)
issues.to_item: Architecture Runtime section: sense.js not documented with interface

issues.description: PRD M4 specifies src/index.js as package.json main exporting startServer, detector, runtime. Architecture does not document this entry point module.
issues.from_item: PRD M4 技术规格: package.json main — src/index.js 导出核心 API (startServer, detector, runtime)
issues.to_item: Architecture: no src/index.js entry point documented

issues.description: PRD M4 specifies profiles CDN should use 'real accessible GitHub raw URL'. Architecture references cdn.example.com placeholder.
issues.from_item: PRD M4 F5: profiles CDN — 真实可访问的 GitHub raw URL

issues.description: Architecture lines 191-252 contain raw task instructions/TODOs appended as plain text, not proper architecture documentation. These are stale change requests polluting the spec.
issues.to_item: Architecture lines 191-252: ~60 lines of unprocessed amendment requests creating ambiguity about authoritative spec

issues.description: Architecture documents agentic-core, agentic-sense, agentic-voice, agentic-store, agentic-embed as external package dependencies. Implementation uses local adapter modules (src/runtime/adapters/, src/store/) as stand-ins. Tasks completed wiring but the dependency model differs from architecture's external package assumption.
issues.from_item: Architecture dependency diagram: agentic-core, agentic-sense, agentic-voice, agentic-store, agentic-embed as external packages
issues.to_item: Tasks implemented local adapters (src/runtime/adapters/, src/store/index.js) instead of external packages

issues.description: Architecture specifies profiles CDN with 4-layer fallback (fresh cache → remote fetch → stale cache → built-in default.json). No dedicated task validates this full 4-layer fallback chain end-to-end.
issues.from_item: Architecture: profiles.js 4-layer fallback with ETag conditional fetch
issues.to_item: No task specifically validates the 4-layer fallback chain

issues.description: Architecture specifies latency budget enforcement (STT≤500ms + LLM≤1000ms + TTS≤500ms = <2s). No task explicitly validates latency budget enforcement.
issues.from_item: Architecture: latency budget enforcement via profiler.js
issues.to_item: No dedicated task for latency budget validation

issues.description: Architecture UI section specifies Vue 3 + Vite with / (chat) and /admin (management panel). 344 tasks are cancelled and active tasks focus on backend, leaving UI implementation coverage unclear.
issues.from_item: Architecture Section 4: UI — Vue 3 + Vite, / and /admin pages
issues.to_item: 344 cancelled tasks; remaining active tasks focus on backend (index.js, port, fallback, Docker, tests)
